title: Chaos Brew
description: Chaos Brew 2.0.0 – Dive into a fully loaded Minecraft experience with over 100 mods! Explore new biomes, terrifying horror entities, advanced automation, magic, and more. Build, fight, craft, and survive with everything from Spooky Doors and Macaw’s creati
body:
📜 Chaos Brew 2.0.0 – Description

“When the world breaks, only chaos brews stronger.”

Chaos Brew is a Forge-based horror survival modpack built for Minecraft 1.20.1, blending terror, tactics, and tech into one brutal experience.
You’ll face nightmarish entities, corrupted landscapes, and dynamic AI that hunts you — but you’ll also have the tools to fight back, build, and survive.

Features

🧠 Psychological & Entity Horror: Mods like The Anomaly, From The Fog, ZeroContact, Cosmic Horror, and Cave Dweller Evolved bring unpredictable encounters and terrifying ambience.

⚙️ Tech & Automation: Create, Steam ‘n Rails, and Create: Crafts & Additions let you build elaborate machinery amid the chaos.

🔫 Tactical Combat: TaCZ, TaCZ Automation, Turrets, and Advanced DeathInfo arm you for survival against the horrors.

🧱 Building Freedom: Macaw’s mod suite and Biomes O’ Plenty expand creativity and environment detail.

💀 Dynamic Survival: Zombie Awareness, Hostile Mobs Improve Over Time, and Ashen’s Zombie Apocalypse ensure the world only grows deadlier the longer you last.

🧰 Quality of Life & Optimisation: Includes ModernFix, FerriteCore, Clumps, ImmediatelyFast, and Dynamic FPS for smooth performance.

Recommended for:
Players who want a grounded, dark survival experience with depth, atmosphere, and tactical intensity — not just another kitchen-sink modpack.

Built & maintained by: oliverps364
Version: 2.0.0 (Forge 1.20.1)
